name: c2pa-x509-zk-circuits
description: Circom circuits for X.509 ZK proof generation in C2PA

scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/x509_issue_and_possession.r1cs pot21_final.ptau build/x509_issue_and_possession_0000.zkey
scripts.contribute: snarkjs zkey contribute build/x509_issue_and_possession_0000.zkey build/x509_issue_and_possession.zkey --name='C2PA Demo' -v
scripts.export-vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/x509_issue_and_possession.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run setup && npm run contribute && npm run export-vkey
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 prove build/x509_issue_and_possession.zkey witness.wtns proof.json public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify build/verification_key.json public.json proof.json
